workerInput.instructions: Create the execution-patterns explanation page at exactly docs-site/src/content/docs/explanation/execution-patterns.md. Explain execution patterns, queue-level pattern config, the gate/respawn circle-back, extendRun + run.extended, and the forward-arc-never-rewind invariant. Match the style of the seeded how-offload-runs.md page: two-key frontmatter (title: and description:), then body prose with ## headings. Edit ONLY that one new file. Then stop.

The upstream page patch is ALREADY applied to your workspace. Fact-check EVERY claim in the page against the seeded source files under the MATERIAL-ACCURACY bar: a finding is a claim that would mislead a reader about actual behavior — invented APIs/fields/config shapes, wrong semantics, wrong names, wrong sequencing or attribution. Do NOT file findings for wording imprecision, incompleteness, stylistic choices, or claims the source broadly supports; a materially accurate page gets NO findings file. Write findings to EXACTLY outputs/findings — no file extension, at the outputs/ root (the provenance binding looks up outputRefs['findings'] literally; findings.json would silently break it) — as a JSON array of { "claim": "...", "reality": "...", "evidence": "file + brief quote/line" }. Write the file ONLY if there is at least one finding. Create no other files. Do not edit the page. Then stop.

Your workspace does NOT contain the page. inputs/work is the unified-diff patch that CREATED the page — its added (+) lines hold the full page text; READ it to recover the page content, do NOT git-apply it. inputs/findings is a JSON array of { claim, reality, evidence } fact-check findings. Your workspace ALSO contains the actual source files the page describes (packages/agora-orchestrator/src/patterns/, contracts/pattern.ts, orchestrator.ts) — after applying every finding's correction, VERIFY every remaining claim in your rewritten text against that source and fix any that are not literally supported (a strict reviewer will re-check every claim). Reconstruct the page from the patch content, correct every finding (keep everything the findings do not dispute), and write the complete corrected file at exactly docs-site/src/content/docs/explanation/execution-patterns.md. Edit ONLY that one file. Then stop.

The page patch is already applied to your workspace — the new page is at docs-site/src/content/docs/explanation/execution-patterns.md; read its frontmatter title for the entry. Add ONE entry to CHANGELOG.md under ## [Unreleased] / ### Added as a bold-titled bullet (use the page's title) announcing the new explanation page and naming docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-06-dogfood-run3-gated-circleback-design.md. Edit ONLY CHANGELOG.md. Then stop.
